name: cc-pipeline
description: cc-pipeline — the build pipeline of the cc-* harness: six stage skills that carry a product from a direction to hardened code (no commands — each invocable by you via slash or by the model). /what-to-do fans out four lenses and ranks where the product could go next; /how-to-do fans out four partisan poles and synthesizes ONE buildable approach for a fork; /do builds one concrete task by a tight set of writing rules (reuse-first, least code, modular bricks, SOLID, no comments, graded logs); then the code is hardened — /refactor reshapes it to the do rules behavior-preserving, /review hunts edge cases, vulnerabilities and bugs and fixes them, /test writes high-value coverage from the outside. Grounding (the roadmap) and architecture live in cc-worker (/planner, /sysdesign). Driven by cc-worker (the worker) and supervised by cc-chief. Depends on cc-tools (its likec4 reference and /slap).
